title: TimelineReceipt
description: Temporal topology - how the PR evolved, friction zones, convergence patterns

pr.description: PR number this receipt is associated with

sessions.description: Burst sessions of activity (contiguous commit clusters)

friction_zones.description: Files/modules with repeated touches over many commits (churn indicators)

oscillations.description: Add/remove/add signals indicating uncertainty or approach changes

convergence.description: How the PR stabilized toward completion

topology.description: Overall evolution pattern of the PR

topology_confidence.description: Confidence level of the topology classification

events.description: Human intervention events during PR lifecycle

Topology.description: Overall evolution pattern: linear (steady progress), cyclical (repeated refinement), chaotic (unclear direction)

Confidence.description: Confidence level: high (strong evidence), medium (reasonable inference), low (limited evidence)

SessionClassification.description: Classification of activity burst: machine_grind (rapid automated commits), human_work (spaced deliberate commits), mixed

OscillationType.description: Type of oscillation: dependency (deps added/removed), file (file created/deleted), feature (feature flag toggled), approach (architectural pivot)

WallClock.description: Wall clock timestamps for the PR lifecycle

first_commit.description: Timestamp of the first commit in the PR

last_commit.description: Timestamp of the last commit in the PR

pr_created.description: Timestamp when the PR was opened

pr_merged.description: Timestamp when the PR was merged (if merged)

total_duration_minutes.description: Total elapsed time from first commit to last commit in minutes

Session.description: A burst session of activity (contiguous commits within a time window)

commit_count.description: Number of commits in this session

classification.description: Inferred session type based on commit frequency and patterns

FrictionZone.description: A file or module with repeated touches indicating friction or churn

touch_count.description: Number of times this path was modified across commits

commits.description: Commit SHAs that touched this path

Oscillation.description: An add/remove/add pattern indicating uncertainty or approach changes

sequence.description: Sequence of actions showing the oscillation pattern

Convergence.description: Signals of PR stabilization toward completion

inflection_commit.description: Commit SHA where churn collapsed and stabilization began

last_n_commits_stable.description: Whether the final commits show stable, non-churning changes

stable_categories.description: Categories of changes in the stable final commits (e.g., 'tests', 'docs', 'receipts')

Event.description: A human intervention event during the PR lifecycle

actor.description: GitHub username or identifier of the person who triggered the event

summary.description: Brief summary of the event (e.g., review comment text, requested changes)
